join_semantics.keeps: All rows from the LEFT table; matched rows from RIGHT; NaN where RIGHT has no match.
join_semantics.result_size: Equal to the left table row count (before multiplicity).
join_semantics.use_when: The LEFT table is your source of truth (e.g. customers). The RIGHT table is enrichment (e.g. orders). Customers with no orders are kept; their order columns are NaN.

merge_report.business_reason: Left join chosen: 'customers' is the source of truth. 'orders' enriches each record. Unmatched customers rows are retained with NaN for orders columns.
merge_report.count_explanation: Left join keeps all 10 left rows plus row multiplication where right has multiple matches per key. Result (14) > left (10).
